title: U.S. Farmers Expect to Plant Record-High Soybean Acreage Planting Intentions Surpass Historic Soybean Record by 6.05 Million Acres, USDA Reports
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) announces a public meeting of an expert panel to consider questions surrounding publication of farm operator demographic data obtained through the 2017 Census of Agriculture.
